_publications._publicationTitle: Neuregulin-1 beta and neuregulin-1 alpha differentially affect the migration and invasion of malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumor cells.

_contextSnippet: We found that PD168393 inhibited NRG-1β induced migration in a concentration-dependent manner (Fig. 8 A), indicating that erbB signaling was essential for this process.
details: Inhibited NRG-1β induced migration in a concentration-dependent manner at 1-1000 nM concentrations
